description: Create a multi-layer geospatial visualization in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset. The visualization must include a region layer displaying 'Sales' by 'State' as filled shapes and a point layer displaying 'Profit' by 'City' overlaid on the states. Save the workbook as 'Geospatial_Analysis' to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Geospatial_Analysis.dva.
